description: The Mannolo are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Cutro and San Leonardo di Cutro, allied with the Trapasso-Zoffreo, Pane-Iazzolino, and Grande Aracri clans. They operate in the Catanzaro area, particularly Cropani and Botricello, engaging in drug trafficking, political influence, and arms use. The clan has been targeted in multiple police operations since the 1990s, with members arrested for mafia association, drug trafficking, extortion, and usury.
